KEYSTONE_ELECTROCUTE_RUNE.title: Electrocute
KEYSTONE_ELECTROCUTE_RUNE.description: Within the same turn, when the same enemy is hit by your targeted cards [blue]{Hits}[/blue] times in a row, trigger [gold]Electrocute[/gold] to deal [blue]{BaseDamage}+{HpPercent}%[/blue] of its current HP as damage.
KEYSTONE_ELECTROCUTE_RUNE.flavor: The third spark is the one that lands.
keystoneElectrocuteRune.title: Electrocute
keystoneElectrocuteRune.description: Within the same turn, when the same enemy is hit by your targeted cards [blue]{Hits}[/blue] times in a row, trigger [gold]Electrocute[/gold] to deal [blue]{BaseDamage}+{HpPercent}%[/blue] of its current HP as damage.
keystoneElectrocuteRune.flavor: The third spark is the one that lands.
KEYSTONE_FIRST_STRIKE_RUNE.title: First Strike
KEYSTONE_FIRST_STRIKE_RUNE.description: The first Attack card you play each combat is played an additional time. When combat ends in victory, gain bonus gold equal to the damage dealt by that first Attack card.
KEYSTONE_FIRST_STRIKE_RUNE.flavor: The opening blow should already be profitable.
keystoneFirstStrikeRune.title: First Strike
keystoneFirstStrikeRune.description: The first Attack card you play each combat is played an additional time. When combat ends in victory, gain bonus gold equal to the damage dealt by that first Attack card.
keystoneFirstStrikeRune.flavor: The opening blow should already be profitable.
KEYSTONE_UNDYING_GRASP_RUNE.title: Grasp of the Undying
KEYSTONE_UNDYING_GRASP_RUNE.description: Every [blue]{CardsPerCharge}[/blue] Attack cards played charges [gold]Grasp[/gold]. The next Attack that deals damage deals bonus damage equal to [blue]{BonusDamagePercent}%[/blue] of your max HP, then heals you for [blue]{HealPercent}%[/blue] of your max HP. The first time this triggers each combat, gain [blue]{MaxHpGain}[/blue] max HP.
keystoneUndyingGraspRune.title: Grasp of the Undying
keystoneUndyingGraspRune.description: Every [blue]{CardsPerCharge}[/blue] Attack cards played charges [gold]Grasp[/gold]. The next Attack that deals damage deals bonus damage equal to [blue]{BonusDamagePercent}%[/blue] of your max HP, then heals you for [blue]{HealPercent}%[/blue] of your max HP. The first time this triggers each combat, gain [blue]{MaxHpGain}[/blue] max HP.
KEYSTONE_CONQUEROR_RUNE.title: Conqueror
KEYSTONE_CONQUEROR_RUNE.description: During your turn, every [blue]{AttacksPerStrength}[/blue] Attack cards grant [blue]1[/blue] Temporary Strength, up to [blue]{MaxStrength}[/blue]. Once you reach the cap, each Attack card you play that turn heals you for [blue]{HealPerAttack}[/blue].
KEYSTONE_CONQUEROR_RUNE.flavor: Momentum is just violence learning to snowball.
keystoneConquerorRune.title: Conqueror
keystoneConquerorRune.description: During your turn, every [blue]{AttacksPerStrength}[/blue] Attack cards grant [blue]1[/blue] Temporary Strength, up to [blue]{MaxStrength}[/blue]. Once you reach the cap, each Attack card you play that turn heals you for [blue]{HealPerAttack}[/blue].
keystoneConquerorRune.flavor: Momentum is just violence learning to snowball.
KEYSTONE_SUMMON_AERY_RUNE.title: Summon Aery
KEYSTONE_SUMMON_AERY_RUNE.description: Every [blue]{CardsPerCharge}[/blue] cards played charges this relic once. At the start of a new turn, it refills its charges. While charged, gaining Block grants [blue]{ActBonus}[/blue] more, and dealing damage deals [blue]{ActBonus}[/blue] more. This bonus equals the current act number.
KEYSTONE_SUMMON_AERY_RUNE.flavor: It never misses your first reach.
keystoneSummonAeryRune.title: Summon Aery
keystoneSummonAeryRune.description: Every [blue]{CardsPerCharge}[/blue] cards played charges this relic once. At the start of a new turn, it refills its charges. While charged, gaining Block grants [blue]{ActBonus}[/blue] more, and dealing damage deals [blue]{ActBonus}[/blue] more. This bonus equals the current act number.
keystoneSummonAeryRune.flavor: It never misses your first reach.
KEYSTONE_LETHAL_TEMPO_RUNE.title: Lethal Tempo
KEYSTONE_LETHAL_TEMPO_RUNE.description: During your turn, every [blue]{StartingAttacks}[/blue] Attack cards you play draws [blue]{CardsDrawn}[/blue] card and reduces the Attack cards needed for the next draw this turn by [blue]1[/blue], to a minimum of [blue]{MinimumAttacks}[/blue]. The count resets each turn.
KEYSTONE_LETHAL_TEMPO_RUNE.flavor: Once the rhythm catches, every strike arrives sooner.
keystoneLethalTempoRune.title: Lethal Tempo
keystoneLethalTempoRune.description: During your turn, every [blue]{StartingAttacks}[/blue] Attack cards you play draws [blue]{CardsDrawn}[/blue] card and reduces the Attack cards needed for the next draw this turn by [blue]1[/blue], to a minimum of [blue]{MinimumAttacks}[/blue]. The count resets each turn.
keystoneLethalTempoRune.flavor: Once the rhythm catches, every strike arrives sooner.
KEYSTONE_PHASE_RUSH_RUNE.title: Phase Rush
KEYSTONE_PHASE_RUSH_RUNE.description: The first time each turn you play [blue]{Cards}[/blue] consecutive cards of the same type, gain {Energy:energyIcons()} and draw [blue]{Draw}[/blue] card.
KEYSTONE_PHASE_RUSH_RUNE.flavor: Once the rhythm catches, the rest comes for free.
keystonePhaseRushRune.title: Phase Rush
keystonePhaseRushRune.description: The first time each turn you play [blue]{Cards}[/blue] consecutive cards of the same type, gain {Energy:energyIcons()} and draw [blue]{Draw}[/blue] card.
keystonePhaseRushRune.flavor: Once the rhythm catches, the rest comes for free.
KEYSTONE_UNSEALED_SPELLBOOK_RUNE.title: Unsealed Spellbook
KEYSTONE_UNSEALED_SPELLBOOK_RUNE.descrip: At the start of each combat, choose [blue]1[/blue] of [blue]{Options}[/blue] temporary random Power cards and add it to your hand. It can be played for free this combat.
KEYSTONE_UNSEALED_SPELLBOOK_RUNE.flavor: The hard part is not finding answers. It is choosing which page to open first.
keystoneUnsealedSpellbookRune.title: Unsealed Spellbook
keystoneUnsealedSpellbookRune.descriptio: At the start of each combat, choose [blue]1[/blue] of [blue]{Options}[/blue] temporary random Power cards and add it to your hand. It can be played for free this combat.
keystoneUnsealedSpellbookRune.flavor: The hard part is not finding answers. It is choosing which page to open first.
KEYSTONE_HAIL_OF_BLADES_RUNE.title: Hail of Blades
KEYSTONE_HAIL_OF_BLADES_RUNE.description: In each combat, the first [blue]{Hits}[/blue] Attack cards you play cost [blue]1[/blue] less for that combat.
KEYSTONE_HAIL_OF_BLADES_RUNE.flavor: Open quickly, and they never get to settle.
keystoneHailOfBladesRune.title: Hail of Blades
keystoneHailOfBladesRune.description: In each combat, the first [blue]{Hits}[/blue] Attack cards you play cost [blue]1[/blue] less for that combat.
keystoneHailOfBladesRune.flavor: Open quickly, and they never get to settle.
KEYSTONE_FLEET_FOOTWORK_RUNE.title: Fleet Footwork
KEYSTONE_FLEET_FOOTWORK_RUNE.description: Every [blue]{CardsPerCharge}[/blue] cards played charges this relic. Your next card is played an additional time and grants {Energy:energyIcons()}.
KEYSTONE_FLEET_FOOTWORK_RUNE.flavor: Once your feet get light, your hands follow.
keystoneFleetFootworkRune.title: Fleet Footwork
keystoneFleetFootworkRune.description: Every [blue]{CardsPerCharge}[/blue] cards played charges this relic. Your next card is played an additional time and grants {Energy:energyIcons()}.
keystoneFleetFootworkRune.flavor: Once your feet get light, your hands follow.
KEYSTONE_ARCANE_COMET_RUNE.title: Arcane Comet
KEYSTONE_ARCANE_COMET_RUNE.description: The first time each turn you use a targeted card on an enemy, deal [blue]{DamagePerRelic}×relic count[/blue] damage to it.
KEYSTONE_ARCANE_COMET_RUNE.flavor: Once the mark lands, the sky eventually answers.
keystoneArcaneCometRune.title: Arcane Comet
keystoneArcaneCometRune.description: The first time each turn you use a targeted card on an enemy, deal [blue]{DamagePerRelic}×relic count[/blue] damage to it.
keystoneArcaneCometRune.flavor: Once the mark lands, the sky eventually answers.
KEYSTONE_GLACIAL_AUGMENT_RUNE.title: Glacial Augment
KEYSTONE_GLACIAL_AUGMENT_RUNE.descriptio: The first time each turn you apply a debuff to an enemy, it gains [blue]1[/blue] Weak and [blue]1[/blue] turn of Slow.
KEYSTONE_GLACIAL_AUGMENT_RUNE.flavor: Cold does not chase. It waits where you must step.
keystoneGlacialAugmentRune.title: Glacial Augment
keystoneGlacialAugmentRune.description: The first time each turn you apply a debuff to an enemy, it gains [blue]1[/blue] Weak and [blue]1[/blue] turn of Slow.
keystoneGlacialAugmentRune.flavor: Cold does not chase. It waits where you must step.
KEYSTONE_AFTERSHOCK_RUNE.title: Aftershock
KEYSTONE_AFTERSHOCK_RUNE.description: The first time each turn you apply a debuff to an enemy, gain [blue]{ActBonus}[/blue] Temporary Dexterity and [blue]{ActBonus}×{BlockMultiplier}[/blue] Block. At the start of your next turn, deal damage equal to [blue]{MaxHpDamagePercent}%[/blue] of your max HP to all enemies. This value equals the current act number.
KEYSTONE_AFTERSHOCK_RUNE.flavor: Stone answers only after the blow lands.
keystoneAftershockRune.title: Aftershock
keystoneAftershockRune.description: The first time each turn you apply a debuff to an enemy, gain [blue]{ActBonus}[/blue] Temporary Dexterity and [blue]{ActBonus}×{BlockMultiplier}[/blue] Block. At the start of your next turn, deal damage equal to [blue]{MaxHpDamagePercent}%[/blue] of your max HP to all enemies. This value equals the current act number.
keystoneAftershockRune.flavor: Stone answers only after the blow lands.
KEYSTONE_GUARDIAN_RUNE.title: Guardian
KEYSTONE_GUARDIAN_RUNE.description: The first time each turn you gain Block from a card, other players gain the same amount of Block. If there are no other players, you gain that much Block again instead.
KEYSTONE_GUARDIAN_RUNE.flavor: A shield is a promise made visible.
keystoneGuardianRune.title: Guardian
keystoneGuardianRune.description: The first time each turn you gain Block from a card, other players gain the same amount of Block. If there are no other players, you gain that much Block again instead.
keystoneGuardianRune.flavor: A shield is a promise made visible.
KEYSTONE_DARK_HARVEST_RUNE.title: Dark Harvest
KEYSTONE_DARK_HARVEST_RUNE.description: Whenever you kill an enemy, permanently gain [blue]1[/blue] Soul. The first time each turn one of your Attack cards hits an enemy below half HP, deal bonus damage equal to [blue]{DamageMultiplier}×[/blue] your Souls. Each enemy can trigger this at most once per combat.
KEYSTONE_DARK_HARVEST_RUNE.flavor: What lingers is never the corpse. It is the echo.
keystoneDarkHarvestRune.title: Dark Harvest
keystoneDarkHarvestRune.description: Whenever you kill an enemy, permanently gain [blue]1[/blue] Soul. The first time each turn one of your Attack cards hits an enemy below half HP, deal bonus damage equal to [blue]{DamageMultiplier}×[/blue] your Souls. Each enemy can trigger this at most once per combat.
keystoneDarkHarvestRune.flavor: What lingers is never the corpse. It is the echo.
